pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh line 50, export_result.sh line 13, verifier.py
Task description, setup_task.sh line 18, export_result.sh line 14

Task description: 'Set a Quiet Period of exactly 120 seconds'. Verified against Jenkins quiet period feature (default 5s, 120s is standard production value for preventing race conditions). Checked in verifier.py line 26, 66.

Task description: 'Disable concurrent builds (ensure Execute concurrent builds if necessary is unchecked)'. Verified against Jenkins concurrentBuild XML configuration (standard boolean option). Checked in verifier.py line 56-61.

Task description: 'Enable Block build when upstream project is building (the upstream project is Backend-Build)'. Verified against Jenkins blockBuildWhenUpstreamBuilding standard feature for preventing race conditions with upstream jobs. Checked in verifier.py line 74-79.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jenkins job 'Production-Deploy' (downstream) with safety settings to prevent race conditions with upstream job 'Backend-Build'. The three required configurations are: (1) disable concurrent builds by setting concurrentBuild to false, (2) set quiet period to exactly 120 seconds to delay build triggers, and (3) enable blockBuildWhenUpstreamBuilding to true to prevent builds while upstream project is building. All metadata values are verified as correct and reflect standard Jenkins configuration options. The data is synthetic, created fresh during task initialization.
